issues.name: docs_agentic_review
issues.likely_cause: The docs system is in strong shape. Positioning is cleanly aligned with the canonical reference ('operating system for autonomous coding', 'composable loop framework', 'simple at the center, powerful in composition', 'strong default workflow', 'adopt as-is first and extend later'). No internal plumbing leakage on top-level surfaces. The GitHub mirror has a coherent README → START_HERE → docs/README journey; Codeberg routes to the website docs which continue the story. Promoted next-click pages (ai-agent-orchestration-cli, spec-driven-ai-agent, unattended-coding-agent, first-task-guide) all reinforce the same narrative instead of fighting it. Copy is clear, confident, and free of hype sludge or confusing framing.
